basic_details.job_title: ICMR NITVAR Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Project Research Scientist, Consultant Posts
basic_details.organization_name: ICMR-National Institute of Translational Virology and AIDS Research (ICMR-NITVAR)

age_limit.age_details: Junior Consultant: 40-50 years, Consultant: 40-60 years, Senior Consultant: 40-70 years, Project Research Scientist I: 35 years
age_limit.details: Junior Consultant: 40-50 years Consultant: 40-60 years Senior Consultant: 40-70 years Project Research Scientist I: 35 years Age relaxation will be as per ICMR guidelines.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS/BDS or equivalent, M.Sc or equivalent, Post Graduate Diploma in Clinical Research, Experience in clinical trials
qualification.details: Consultant (Medical): MBBS or BDS or equivalent with 6-12 years post-qualification experience (Junior/Consultant/Senior levels); Retired Govt employees in Pay Level 10+ with 10 years experience. Consultant (Non-Medical) (Statistic): M.Sc or equivalent with 6-12 years post-qualification experience (Junior/Consultant/Senior levels); Retired Govt employees in Pay Level 10+ with 10 years experience. Project Research Scientist I (Medical): MBBS/BDS.

salary_details.pay_scale: Junior: Rs.60,000-90,000/-; Consultant: Rs.80,000-120,000/-; Senior: Rs.1,00,000-1,50,000/- (or as per Ministry of Finance OM for retired); Rs.67,000/- + HRA
salary_details.details: Junior Consultant: Rs.60,000-90,000/- Consultant: Rs.80,000-120,000/- Senior Consultant: Rs.1,00,000-1,50,000/- (or as per Ministry of Finance OM for retired) Project Research Scientist I (Medical): Rs.67,000/- + HRA

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ICMR-NITVAR recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is through a walk-in interview, and candidates need to attend the interview on 30 June 2026. There is no separate last date for application submission.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies announced by ICMR-NITVAR?
faq.answer: ICMR-NITVAR has announced a total of 5 vacancies for Consultant (Medical) and related posts through this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Consultant (Medical) post?
faq.answer: For the Consultant (Medical) post, candidates need to have an MBBS or BDS or equivalent degree with 6-12 years of post-qualification experience.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for ICMR-NITVAR recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the Consultant posts?
faq.answer: The age limit varies for different levels: Junior Consultant (40-50 years), Consultant (40-60 years), and Senior Consultant (40-70 years).

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Consultant posts?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs.60,000-90,000/- for Junior Consultant, Rs.80,000-120,000/- for Consultant, and Rs.1,00,000-1,50,000/- for Senior Consultant.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Walk-In-Interview and potentially a Written Test.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview scheduled to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at ICMR-National Institute of Translational Virology and AIDS Research (ICMR-NITVAR) in Pune, Maharashtra (Pin code: 411026).

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The job is on a contractual basis.
